asset_family: composed first screen fake shot and source families
audience: broad PC fantasy RPG players; serious readable browser RPG adventure, not satire, not idle, not debug UI

required_asset_groups.role: single composed target for the first native screen: Old Gate scene, hero, Gate Warden quest focus, route strip, wolf encounter preview, reward preview, and persistent browser-RPG frame
required_asset_groups.content_policy: direction target only; do not treat as one fused runtime UI image
required_asset_groups.coordinate_policy: composition notes and future runtime layout must remain Y-up; any screen-space conversion is boundary-only

required_asset_groups.role: painted Old Gate town-hub backdrop and route strip layers
required_asset_groups.content_policy: no UI text, no baked labels, no copied reference landmarks
required_asset_groups.layer_policy: background, route strip, destination plaques, and lock/quest highlights should be separable or reproducible

required_asset_groups.role: isolated hero, Gate Warden, and Road Wolf silhouettes with pivots for runtime composition
required_asset_groups.content_policy: transparent or flat chroma-key background; no text, no reference-game character copies

required_asset_groups.role: quest marker, route marker, lock, wolf encounter marker, ring reward, XP, and gold icons
required_asset_groups.content_policy: isolated icons with gutters; no numbers or labels baked into icons

required_asset_groups.role: ornate but readable browser-RPG frame pieces for top hero status, right quest rail, bottom log/action belt, button bases, and reward slots
required_asset_groups.content_policy: runtime text/icons only inside safe areas
required_asset_groups.stretch_zone_policy: centers and long edges must be repeatable; unique ornaments stay in corners or separate overlays
required_asset_groups.decor_overlay_policy: quest gems, banners, medallions, locks, and corner ornaments must be separate overlays or fixed corner pieces, never stretched through the center

source_families: fantasy browser rpg ui frame sheet

final_asset_policy.notes: Code may cut, validate, pack, and compose. Code-generated/programmer art is not acceptable as final generated UI unless an explicit exception is recorded.

source_family_roles.composed old gate fake shot: full-screen target composition for direction review only; not a fused runtime asset
source_family_roles.blank UI kit sheet: canonical reusable blank UI bases if the frame sheet is split into validator-standard panels, buttons, bars, and dividers
source_family_roles.isolated icon sheet: canonical semantic icon set if reward and route icons are split into validator-standard isolated icons
source_family_roles.old gate background layer sheet: painted Old Gate scene, route strip, destination plaque parts, and lock/quest highlight layers
source_family_roles.hero npc enemy sprite sheet: isolated hero, Gate Warden, Road Wolf, and small combat pose silhouettes with pivots
source_family_roles.quest reward route icon sheet: quest marker, route arrow, lock, ring reward, XP, gold, sword/auto-battle icons with gutters
source_family_roles.fantasy browser rpg ui frame sheet: slice9-safe frame, quest rail, bottom log belt, reward slots, button states, and decor overlays

prompt_constraints: no fused icons inside button backgrounds
transparent or flat chroma-key background for isolated assets
no unique decoration inside slice9 stretch zones
no copied Legend, Dragon Eternity, AQW, Shakes and Fidget, or Wartune UI ornament shapes
Y-up must be preserved in layout notes and runtime translation

required_source_families: fantasy browser rpg ui frame sheet
expected_outputs.runtime_scope_note: Source families are accepted. Runtime crop, slice9 metadata, atlas packing, and native integration are still required before final-art or product-gate claims.

runtime_composition.layout_axis: Y-up in game/UI logic; renderer, input, and DevAPI convert at boundaries only
runtime_composition.main_scene: painted Old Gate background plus separate hero, Gate Warden, route, lock, and objective markers
runtime_composition.quest_rail: slice9 quest rail plus runtime text, portrait marker, reward icons, and one primary button
runtime_composition.route_strip: destination plaques and markers composed over a route layer
runtime_composition.battle_preview: Road Wolf sprite or marker plus runtime stats/reward icons
runtime_composition.bottom_log: slice9 log/action belt plus runtime text and item pop feedback

qa_rejects: one fused screenshot used as runtime UI
text or labels baked into reusable pieces
Y-up assumptions inverted in layout notes

commands.new_generation_record: node tools/assets/job/new_generation_record.mjs --id <source-id> --project-dir gamedesign/projects/ember-road --source-family "<source family>" --source-family-role "<source family role>" --accepted-source <path> --provider <provider> --model <model-or-workflow> --workflow-path <workflow.json> --prompt-packet gamedesign/projects/ember-road/art/prompts/<source-id>-prompt.json --seed <seed> --prompt "<prompt>" --negative-prompt "<negative prompt>"
commands.slice_assets: fill after source sheets are accepted
commands.build_pack: fill after pack builder is wired
